testCases.title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations facet Returns term_facets Structure
testCases.notes: Cart setup now deterministic (add_item PASS, validationErrors=0 PASS — BUG-050k-004 fix validated). API returns term_facets=[] for all three requested facets (address.countryCode, address.regionName, address.city). Second failure is a runner parse error on the [DATA label=probe_facets] 'is non-empty' predicate (DV-019 candidate). Product gap: cartPickupLocations does not yet implement facet aggregation. Confirmed product gap GAP-XPICKUP-001 — requires PR #8 scope confirmation.

testCases.title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations filter Narrows Result Set
testCases.notes: Cart setup now deterministic (add_item PASS, validationErrors=0 PASS — BUG-050k-004 fix validated). filter=address.countryCode:USA returns totalCount=0 when unfiltered baseline returns 102 USA locations. Filter argument is accepted by the API (no errors[]) but has no effect — all locations have countryCode=USA yet the filtered query returns 0. Product gap GAP-XPICKUP-002 — cartPickupLocations filter argument not implemented in PR #8. 2 cross-OP [COUNT] predicates demoted to [EVIDENCE] (BUG-050k-003 fix applied). 8/9 assertions pass.

bugs.title: cartPickupLocations: term_facets argument accepted but returns empty array — facet aggregation not implemented
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Add product b3f5bd0c-45e4-46dc-8f2d-ad089718fc32 to cart via addItem mutation. 2. Execute cartPickupLocations with facet='address.countryCode address.regionName address.city'. 3. Inspect term_facets in response.
bugs.expected: term_facets contains at least 1 entry for each of the 3 requested facets with populated terms[] (name, label, count)
bugs.actual: term_facets = [] — empty array returned regardless of facet argument

bugs.title: cartPickupLocations: filter argument accepted but returns 0 results — filter predicate not applied
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Add product to cart via addItem. 2. Execute cartPickupLocations with no filter → totalCount=102 (baseline). 3. Execute with filter='address.countryCode:USA' (all 102 locations are USA). 4. Check totalCount.
bugs.expected: Filtered query with address.countryCode:USA should return totalCount=102 (all locations match) — filter narrows but does not eliminate when all locations satisfy the predicate
bugs.actual: totalCount=0 — filter argument silently discards all results. API returns no errors[].
